articles.title: GEMINI BUSINESS AND GEMINI ENTERPRISE PLANS FOR GOOGLE WORKSPACE ARE COMING
articles.summary: Google is introducing "Gemini Business" and "Gemini Enterprise" plans for Workspace customers, offering access to its advanced AI model, Gemini 1.0 Ultra, with enterprise-grade data protection. It will not use employee conversations for model training.

articles.title: OPENAI VALUED AT $80 BILLION IN DEAL WITH THRIVE CAPITAL
articles.summary: OpenAI has reportedly reached a valuation of over $80 billion following a deal with VC firm Thrive Capital. This valuation marks a nearly 3x increase in less than 10 months, making OpenAI the 3rd highest-valued tech startup in the world. The deal involves a share sale under a "tender offer," allowing employees to cash out their shares in the company.

articles.title: MAGIC RAISES $117M TO CONTINUE CODE GENERATION MODELS
articles.summary: Magic is building an AI software engineer and has raised more to help with this process.

articles.title: KV QUANT - SCALING TO 10M TOKENS
articles.summary: Quantizing the KV cache, which is a technical detail of the Transformer architecture, allows it to use less memory at inference time. Quantization is the shrinking of the floating point precision with minimal loss in quality.

articles.title: ENHANCED SPEECH TRANSLATION
articles.summary: ZeroSwot is a new method for Speech Translation (ST) that overcomes the lack of data and differences between speech and text. It uses unique techniques to train a speech encoder with only speech recognition data, allowing it to work with a multilingual translation model.

articles.title: MAKING CLIP’S VISUALLY UNDERSTANDABLE
articles.summary: SpLiCE is a new method that makes CLIP's complex visual data easier to understand.

articles.title: TAKE THE PROJECT MANAGEMENT OUT OF PRODUCT BUILDING
articles.summary: When you started building a product, you didn’t dream of endless admin and organization tasks. You wanted to make something people would love. Meet Height [11], an AI project tool to manage the work for you, invisibly, automatically, and autonomously.

articles.title: Be the first to access Height 2.0
LIBRARY FOR CONTROLVECTORS
articles.summary: ControlVectors are a way to cheaply steer semantic generation output. They are cheaper to train than LoRA but can still be quite effective. This library makes it easier.

articles.title: OPENRLHF
articles.summary: This is a Ray-based implementation of RLHF for Llama-style models, which includes Mistral. It contains a number of PPO stabilization tricks to improve performance.

articles.title: 3D DIFFUSER FOR SMARTER ROBOTS
articles.summary: The 3D Diffuser Actor combines diffusion policies and 3D scene representations to improve robot manipulation. This AI-driven approach allows robots to understand and interact with their environment more effectively.

articles.title: HOW TO JOINTLY TUNE LR AND WD IN ADAMW
articles.summary: AdamW is commonly used to decouple learning rate and weight decay. However, the common implementation in Pytorch doesn’t explicitly do this. This post discusses how to tune these parameters.

articles.title: INSIDE OPENAI (68 MINUTE PODCAST)
articles.summary: Ever wondered how OpenAI is able to innovate and build at such a fast pace? In this podcast, Logan Kilpatrick, OpenAI's head of developer relations, discusses OpenAI's unique culture, the importance of high agency and urgency, and the company's decision-making framework for launching products.

articles.title: ENHANCING DENSE VIDEO ANALYSIS TRANSFORMERS
articles.summary: A new Temporal Dilated Video Transformer (TDViT) has been developed to improve the analysis of dense video tasks, such as frame-by-frame video object detection.

articles.title: OPENLLMETRY
articles.summary: OpenLLMetry-JS is a set of extensions built on top of OpenTelemetry that gives you complete observability over your LLM application.

articles.title: LIST OF GPU CLUSTERS FOR RENT
articles.summary: A list of full clusters that are available for rent by the hour.

articles.title: UNSPAM AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Ensure your emails land in the inbox, not spam.
